confirm.requires_confirm.zh: {action} 需要显式传 confirm=True（会改状态/消耗资源），否则不发包

gateway.error_response.zh: 游戏网关返回了错误响应
gateway.error_response.en: game gateway returned an error response

ngsm.validation_failed.zh: Nexon NGS-X/NGSM 校验失败；请配置真实的 Android NGS-X attestation provider
ngsm.validation_failed.en: Nexon NGS-X/NGSM validation failed; configure a real Android NGS-X attestation provider

login.account_password_required.zh: Android 直连登录需要账号和密码
login.account_password_required.en: account and password are required for Android direct login

login.region_no_candidates.zh: 没有可探测的候选区服
login.region_no_candidates.en: no candidate regions for auto region detection

login.region_autodetect_failed.zh: 区服自动探测失败：{regions} 都未登录成功（{errors}）；请显式指定 region
login.region_autodetect_failed.en: region auto-detect failed for {regions}: {errors}; please set region explicitly

login.client_version_failed.zh: client_version 缺失，且从 Galaxy Store 在线获取版本号失败
login.client_version_failed.en: client_version is required and Galaxy Store lookup failed

login.session_not_restored.zh: 尚未恢复会话（请先 login 或 restore_session）

login.credentials_hidden.zh: 本 SDK 不暴露任何登录凭证
login.credentials_hidden.en: credentials are not exposed by this SDK

login.session_must_be_mapping.en: session payload must be a mapping

login.game_service_needs_session.zh: 游戏服务需要先恢复会话（login 或 restore_session）
login.game_service_needs_session.en: game service requires a restored session

region.unknown.en: unknown server region {region}; expected one of {options}

proxy.system_not_found.zh: proxy 设为自动探测，但没找到系统代理。请在 Clash/V2Ray 里开启「系统代理 / Set as system proxy」，或设置 HTTPS_PROXY 环境变量，或显式传 proxy='host:port'。（PAC/自动配置脚本仅尽力解析，必要时设 HLBA_PAC_URL 指定）
proxy.system_not_found.en: proxy is set to auto-detect but no system proxy was found. Enable 'Set as system proxy' in Clash/V2Ray, set the HTTPS_PROXY env var, or pass proxy='host:port' explicitly. (PAC scripts are best-effort; set HLBA_PAC_URL if needed.)

proxy.unsupported_scheme.zh: 不支持的代理协议 {scheme}；可用：{options}
proxy.unsupported_scheme.en: unsupported proxy scheme {scheme}; use one of: {options}

session.daily_reset_expired.zh: 会话已跨过 Blue Archive 每日刷新；调用游戏 API 前请重新登录 (session_day={session_day}, current_day={current_day}, daily_reset_utc={reset_utc}, local_reset={local_reset})
session.daily_reset_expired.en: session crossed Blue Archive daily reset; login again before using game APIs (session_day={session_day}, current_day={current_day}, daily_reset_utc={reset_utc}, local_reset={local_reset})
